whyUs.title: WHY US
whyUs.heading: We graduate founders. You don't get locked in.
whyUs.benefit4: No long contracts. No equity strings.

hero.title: From idea to production.
hero.subtitle: One senior engineer. Four steps. No long contracts, no overpriced agencies, no surprise bills.

match.title: Match.
match.description: Share your idea, stack and pace in a 30-min call. We pair you with a senior engineer who fits stack, time-zone, and temperament.

build.title: Build.
build.description: Production-grade code, infra, security set up correctly the first time. Weekly demos. No agency layer.

mentor.title: Mentor.
mentor.description: Working sessions. You learn the why behind every choice — auth, payments, deploys, observability.

launch.title: Launch.
launch.description: Clean docs, tested codebase, hiring spec for your next dev. You graduate ready to scale.

item4.title: Mentorship arc
item4.description: you learn how the system works

item5.title: Hand-off package
item5.description: docs + hiring spec for your next dev

sprint.title: A TYPICAL 6-WEEK SPRINT
sprint.footer: You ship a real v1 in production, not a demo.

cta.title: Ready to pair? Book the 30-min call.

hero.title: Real founders. Shipped products.
hero.subtitle: We don't show engineers' faces — we show what they shipped. Three live products built with our workforce.

cta.title: Could yours be the next field report?

hero.title: Builders who've been on both sides of the gap.
hero.subtitle: We started Rent a Techie because we kept watching the same story play out — brilliant founders, dead products. So we built the bridge.

mission.title: MISSION
mission.text: Pair every non-technical founder with a senior engineer they can actually afford — and graduate them ready to scale.

noAgencies.title: No agencies
noAgencies.description: You work directly with the engineer. No account manager layer.

noEquity.title: No equity
noEquity.description: We never take equity. You graduate fully owning your company.

noContracts.title: No long contracts
noContracts.description: Sprint to sprint. Cancel any time. Keep what was built.

noFluff.title: No fluff
noFluff.description: Production code or nothing. Demos are not the deliverable.

cta.title: Want to talk shop? We're founders, too.

hero.title: Book the call. No commitment, no pitch deck needed.
hero.subtitle: 30-minute intro. We listen, you scope, and we match you with a senior engineer — usually within 72 hours.

widget.title: SCHEDULING WIDGET · EMBED
widget.subtitle: Pick a time. No strings attached.
